summary: Comprehensive feature testing completed on production website www.visionary-suite.com and preview API. All requested features tested successfully. Fixed 2 backend bugs in monitoring.py during testing. 20/20 backend tests pass, all frontend features verified working.

fixed_during_testing.issue: system-health endpoint returned 500 error due to get_queue_status.__wrapped__ call
fixed_during_testing.fix: Replaced with direct database query for queue health

fixed_during_testing.issue: load-test/history endpoint matched as {test_id} due to route ordering

issues: CSP violation for Cloudflare beacon script - not blocking functionality

landing_page.notes: Hero section, CTAs, stats (5-10s Reel, 30-90s Story Pack, 100 Free Credits, 50K+ Content), navigation all working

login_flow.notes: Email/password login working with admin credentials. Google Sign-in available.

dashboard.notes: All tool cards displayed: Generate Reel Script, Create Kids Story Pack, Photo to Comic, Comic Story Book Builder, Reaction GIF, Coloring Book, Tone Switcher, Challenge Gen, Story Episode Creator, Content Challenge Planner, Caption Rewriter Pro

kids_story_pack.notes: Age Group dropdown, Genre dropdown (Fantasy default), Number of Scenes (8 scenes/10 credits), Cost: 6 credits, Generate Story Pack button functional

coloring_book_generator.notes: 5-step wizard (Mode→Content→Customize→Preview→Download). Two modes: Generate From Story (10 credits, Recommended) and Convert Photos (5 credits). 100% Original Content disclaimer.

comic_storybook_builder.notes: 5-step wizard (Genre→Story→Length→Add-ons→Generate). 8 story types: Kids Adventure, Superhero, Fantasy, Comedy, Romance, Sci-Fi, Mystery, Spooky Fun. Content Policy displayed.

reel_generator.notes: Topic input, Niche/Tone/Duration/Language/Goal/Audience dropdowns. Cost: 10 credits per reel. Generate Reel Script button functional.

gif_maker.notes: 4-step wizard (Upload→Reaction→Style→Create). Upload area for PNG/JPG/WEBP up to 10MB. Content Policy displayed.

photo_to_comic.notes: Two modes: Comic Avatar (RECOMMENDED, 3 Steps, From 15 credits) and Comic Strip (POPULAR, 5 Steps, From 25 credits). Content Policy displayed.

live_chat_widget.notes: Chat widget opens from bottom-right button. Context-aware responses working. Quick questions displayed. Bot responds with helpful information and links.

watermark_service.notes: Returns shouldApply (true/false) based on user plan and payment history. Admin/paid users get shouldApply=false.

load_testing_api.notes: Starts load test with configurable test_type (api/generation/concurrent), num_requests (1-100), concurrent_users (1-20). Returns testId and status URL.

queue_monitoring_api.notes: Returns queueStatus (pending, processing, completedToday, failedToday, successRate, health), processingTimes, jobsByType, recentFailures.

system_health_api.notes: Returns health score/status, dbConnected status, activeUsers, creditsUsedHour, creditTransactionsHour, errorsHour.

load_test_history_api.notes: Returns list of previous load tests with stats (totalRequests, successful, failed, successRate, avgLatencyMs, etc.)

critical_code_review_comments: All user-facing pages load correctly with proper content
Login/Logout flow works correctly with admin credentials
All creator tools have proper wizards with clear steps and credit costs
Live Chat Widget is context-aware and provides helpful responses
Watermark service correctly identifies paid vs free users
Monitoring APIs provide comprehensive system health and queue status
Load testing functionality works as expected
CSP console warning for Cloudflare beacon is cosmetic only

details.cause: Attempted to call get_queue_status.__wrapped__ which doesn't exist for FastAPI endpoint functions
details.fix: Replaced with direct database query for pending count and queue health calculation

details.cause: Route /load-test/{test_id} was defined before /load-test/history, causing 'history' to be matched as test_id

test_credentials.note: test@visionary-suite.com credentials return 401 - user may not exist or password incorrect

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 122 completed comprehensive testing of all new features. Fixed 2 bugs in monitoring.py (route ordering and function call issue). All monitoring APIs now working: queue-status, system-health, load-test/start, load-test/history, feature-usage, output-tracking. All frontend features verified: Story Generator, Coloring Book (5-step wizard), Comic Storybook (5-step wizard with 8 genres), Reel Generator, GIF Maker (4-step), Photo to Comic (2 modes), Live Chat Widget. Watermark service correctly handles paid/free users.
